notes: v0.16.51 — BOSS RUSH leaderboard fixes + BRUTAL perf wins. Hover tooltip on a leaderboard row now shows the runner's ACTUAL ship (animated skin atlas from the run) and the FULL equipped-module loadout snapshot — not the default skin and not empty modules. Class filter (ALL / SHARD / BASTION / LANCE / CHORUS) now scopes the GLOBAL leaderboard instead of falling back to local-only — picking BASTION shows the top BASTION clears from everyone. New clears submit class/skin/modules so they're queryable per-class. Old clears (pre-v0.16.51) show under ALL only. (Server-side deploy of migration 003 + leaderboards.go must complete before the global tooltip + class filter return data for OTHER players' runs; your own local runs work immediately.) PERF: skin atlas drops MSAA_4X + FXAA on the 3D viewport during PLAYING (re-enabled on the menu) — major BRUTAL frame-time win. PERF: bullet.gd off-screen cull — bullets > half-viewport + margin away from camera centre skip _draw() entirely (9 draw_circle calls per bullet). Big BRUTAL win on dense volleys. Windows only.
